tasks.title: Implement PATCH /api/tickets/:id/assignee endpoint
tasks.description: Add route handler that validates payload, updates ticket assignee via TicketStore, and returns updated ticket or 501 for unsupported stores.
tasks.design_notes: Leverage existing TicketStore interface; return 400 on invalid body and 404 if ticket missing.

tasks.title: Extend TicketStore interface and MemoryTicketStore for assignment
tasks.description: Add assignTicket(id, assignee) method to the interface and implement it in MemoryTicketStore, updating the in‑memory map.
tasks.design_notes: Keep method pure; emit an event or log for future audit integration.

tasks.title: Add ticket assignment UI to ticket detail view
tasks.description: Create a dropdown of agents in the React ticket component, call the shared API client to PATCH assignee, and refresh state on success.
tasks.design_notes: Use React Query or simple useEffect hook to manage optimistic UI updates.

tasks.title: Implement SQLiteTicketStore with migrations
tasks.description: Create SQLite schema for tickets, write CRUD methods including assignTicket, and add migration script run at server start.
tasks.design_notes: Wrap sqlite3 with async/await via better-sqlite3 or sqlite with promises; ensure migrations are idempotent.

tasks.title: Wire configurable TicketStore selection (Memory vs SQLite)
tasks.description: Read env variable (e.g., STORE_TYPE) in server/app.ts and instantiate the appropriate TicketStore implementation.
tasks.design_notes: Use a factory function to encapsulate store creation, keeping server startup clean.

tasks.title: Add admin auth middleware and protect audit log endpoint
tasks.description: Implement JWT‑based admin check, apply middleware to GET /api/audit, and return 403 for non‑admin requests.
tasks.design_notes: Reuse existing auth scaffold; store admin secret in .env and verify token signature.

tasks.title: Write integration tests for assignment and admin audit access
tasks.description: Add Vitest/Supertest cases covering successful assignment, 400/404 errors, and admin‑only access to /api/audit with valid/invalid tokens.
tasks.design_notes: Mock SQLite store for speed; use generated JWTs for auth scenarios.

commits.summary: Add project scaffolding: env example, CI workflow, .gitignore, and README
